message.content:
The screenshot displays a **voice room app interface** (likely Yalla Ludo, based on the welcome message) with a dark-themed, layered layout. Below is a detailed breakdown of all visible elements:


### **1. Top Status Bar & Header**
- **Background**: A large, blurred image of a lion’s face (dominant visual element).
- **Top Icons (Left to Right)**:  
  - A **microphone icon** (white, circular, with a black mic symbol) – likely for muting/unmuting.  
  - A **smiley face emoji** (yellow, wide-grinning, with closed eyes) – possibly for sending reactions.  
  - A **circular avatar** (small, with a blurred profile picture) – user’s profile or host avatar.  
  - Another **smiley face emoji** (identical to the first) – repeat of the reaction button.  
  - A **"Locked" label** (white text, left-aligned) – indicates the room is private or restricted.  
  - A **"m" label** (white text) – likely a user’s username or status.  
  - A **"P" label** (white text) – possibly a role (e.g., "Player" or "Host").  
  - A **"5" label** (white text) – likely the number of participants or a score.  
- **Microphone Grid**: A 3x4 grid of **microphone icons** (white, circular) with numbers (5, 6, 7, 8, 10) – indicates active speakers or participant slots.  
- **Room Info Banner**: A green banner with:  
  - **"[Room ID]"** (white text) – room identifier.  
  - A **circular avatar** (small, with a blurred profile) – host or participant.  
  - **"Welcome to Yalla Ludo. Please respect each and chat in a decent manner."** (white text) – room rules.  
  - A **heart icon** (white) – for liking the room.  


### **2. Currency & Action Bar**
- **Coin Display**: A **gold coin icon** (left) with **"4.3M"** (white text) – total in-app currency.  
- **"+" Button** (white, circular) – to add/earn coins.  
- **"ent:" Label** (white text) – likely "Content" or a category.  
- **"✓everyone" Label** (white text) – possibly a filter or permission setting.  


### **3. Tab Navigation**
A horizontal tab bar with four tabs (dark blue background, white text):  
- **"Classic"** (selected, underlined) – current view.  
- **"Activity"** – for room activities/events.  
- **"Member"** – for participant list.  
- **"Roy"** (truncated, likely "Royalty" or "Rewards") – rewards section.  
- **Blue Bag Icon** (right of tabs) – likely a store or rewards menu.  


### **4. Game/Feature Grid (Classic Tab)**
A 2x4 grid of interactive cards (dark background, each with an icon, title, and price):  
- **Row 1**:  
  - **Balloon**: Icon = two colorful balloons (red/blue). Title = "Balloon". Price = "1000" (gold coin icon).  
  - **Astronaut -..**: Icon = astronaut in space. Title = "Astronaut -.." (truncated). Price = "5999".  
  - **Pick Stars f..**: Icon = fantasy character (e.g., princess). Title = "Pick Stars f.." (truncated). Price = "9999".  
  - **Through the..**: Icon = car/racing scene. Title = "Through the.." (truncated). Price = "5999".  
- **Row 2**:  
  - **Love Diamo..**: Icon = pink heart/diamond. Title = "Love Diamo.." (truncated). Price = "15999".  
  - **Ice Cubes**: Icon = blue ice cubes. Title = "Ice Cubes". Price = "3" (gold coin icon).  
  - **Little Duck**: Icon = yellow rubber duck. Title = "Little Duck". Price = "9".  
  - **Fan**: Icon = green fan. Title = "Fan". Price = "19".  
- **"NEW" Badge**: Small red badge on the "Love Diamo.." card – indicates a new feature.  
- **"VIP" Badge**: Small blue badge on the "Balloon" card – indicates a premium feature.  


### **5. Bottom Chat Bar**
- **Left Icons**:  
  - **Microphone Icon** (white, circular) – to toggle voice chat.  
  - **"$" Icon** (white) – likely for sending coins/gifts.  
  - **"P" Label** (white) – repeat of the role/status from the header.  
- **Input Field**: A text box (dark background) with a **caret (text cursor)** – for typing messages.  
- **"1" Label** (white, right of input) – likely the number of unread messages or a counter.  
- **"Send" Button** (blue, rectangular) – to send messages.  


### **Key Features & Patterns**
- **Mic Patterns**: The top microphone grid (3x4) suggests a structured voice room with assigned slots for speakers (numbers 5, 6, 7, 8, 10 indicate active participants).  
- **Settings/Options**: Implied via tabs ("Activity", "Member", "Roy") and icons (bag, mic, $) – likely for room management, participant lists, and rewards.  
- **Interactive Elements**: All cards (games/features) are tappable (prices suggest in-app purchases), and the chat bar supports text input.  


This layout emphasizes **social interaction** (voice chat, reactions, participant management) and **in-app purchases** (game/feature cards) within a voice room context.
